title: Add review-only end-to-end OLA learning smoke
goal: Add one bounded OLA circle proof from routing outcome fixtures through heimlern proposal generation to contract validation, keeping the result review-only.

acceptance.assertion: The smoke fixture corpus covers success, blocked, failed and fail-closed routing outcomes.
Each success, blocked, failed and fail-closed routing outcome fixture is exercised through the offline proposal and validation path, or documented as an intentional no-proposal case.
The smoke proves the offline circle only and does not change routing behavior.

metadata.claude_delegation: optional review if the smoke boundary becomes ambiguous

validated_acceptance.fixture-corpus: Heimlern PR #196 adds tests/fixtures/ola/blocked.ok.json and tests/fixtures/ola/fail_closed_collision.corpus.json; existing success.ok.json and failed.ok.json remain covered by the smoke.
validated_acceptance.circle-proof: scripts/ola_circle_smoke.py runs success, blocked and single failed fixtures as intentional no-proposal cases, validates an amplified failed-route proposal against policy.weight_adjustment.v1, and verifies fail-closed route-key collision blocking.
validated_acceptance.review-only: scripts/ola_circle_smoke.py emits review_only=true, writes=[] and does_not_establish for routing readiness, automatic rule changes, runtime policy mutation and causal route superiority.

validation: GitHub rust (cached) workflow for head 79cc2e475de7fb67500e5f64deb99bc5da12d412 succeeded: build-test and schema-validate jobs passed; schema-validate includes ola_circle_smoke.py.
